post.body:
I got 68% in test i did last week. Im really quite please with that as I was fearing the worst. 

I have an assignment to be in for tomorrow - which is not good, as i havent done a great deal for it. Im calling into work sick today so i can work on it. I dont feel too guilty about doing it as i havent been that well over the last week or so. 

Might also call in sick on friday so i can go home on friday night and spent 2 NIGHTS at home this weekend!

On another note - I joined the gym today! cost a tenner... that could have bought me cigarettes... or drink - but no, im gonna get fit!
